name: astrocyte
description: Self-hosted agent memory for Codex. Adds retain / recall / reflect / forget / compile tools backed by a local astrocyte-mcp server.

interface.shortDescription: Self-hosted persistent memory for AI coding workflows
interface.longDescription: Astrocyte gives Codex long-term memory backed by your own Postgres. Store decisions, user preferences, project context, conversational history. Section-grain recall keeps conversation structure intact across long histories; multi-bank isolation lets one Codex instance serve many projects without leakage. Self-hosted — your data stays in your infrastructure.
defaultPrompt: Recall what we decided about the auth flow last week
Remember that I prefer pgvectorscale over HNSW for vector indexes
What do we know about the M9 PageIndex migration?
